column2: #9 HM Section for 50' HM w/ clamp
column7: For those looking to take their 50' Tucker carbon pole to new heights without using the yellow fiberglass base section, this high-mod #9 section is the perfect upgrade. Simply replace the standard yellow #9 base section with this reinforced high modulus carbon fiber section, which is designed to work seamlessly with #10 extensions. Unlike the yellow #9, this high-mod version provides added durability, minimizing flex when using additional extensions. A great choice for those aiming for higher, safer, and more stable performance. Note: We highly recommend you familiarize yourself with appropriate PPE to be used when working on or around electrical hazards including, but not limited to dielectric boots and gloves. Fore more safety information please see this page HERE

column7: Note: Looking to reach 30' or higher? Check out our carbon fiber options! The added rigidity of the material makes reaching tall windows much easier. Our carbon fiber poles can also be extended to meet your needs! TUCKER® - BRAVO WATER FED POLE The Tucker® Bravo pole is an incredibly affordable water fed pole geared towards those wanting to work just lower level floors. Made from high quality hybrid sections which are a blend of carbon fiber and fiberglass. The addition of the fiberglass does add a bit of flex to the pole at full extension, but it also brings down the cost. Made with the all new Tucker® V2 clamps and including the Tucker® GLIDE brush. What's included: Tucker® - Bravo Water Fed Pole Tucker® GLIDE Window Cleaning Brush 100' Tucker® 5/16" OD Pole Tubing 1 Set of Male and Female Quick-Connect Fittings Tucker® LOCT Reach Around Gooseneck Acme tip to convert from water fed to trad pole Specs: Fully extended height: 22 feet 6 inches Collapsed length: 5 feet 7 inches...

Carefully crafted with top-quality components, each system features a 50 gallon tank, powder-coated aluminum frame, two digital flow controllers, two 150' premium Tucker® hose reels, and two 12v pumps with digital pump controllers operated by remote fobs. Compact and efficient. NOTE - Proper Deep Cycle Marine Battery necessary to power unit.

column7: One Full Cubic foot of virgin DI Resin from Tucker®. Great for refilling the various refillable filter cartridges on the market today. Most sell resin in bags that are not easily resealable, which often causes the resin to go bad prematurely. This DI resin is sold in a resealable, reusable bucket to ensure that it lasts as long as possible while being stored. The shelf life of this resin is typically 6 months depending on storage conditions. Note: Water purified by DI resin is non-potable. Do not drink DI water. Call for Bulk Order Information at 303-663-1779 or email us at info@rhgproducts.com.

column7: RHG Catalytic Carbon blocks contain specially formulated catalytic carbon. This is a specially enhanced carbon developed through an advanced process starting as Activated Carbon. By altering the electron structure of the carbon, it enhances its catalytic capability, enabling it to cause chemical reactions without changing its structure. As a result, it promotes a wide range of chemical reactions where conventional carbons are not effective. Catalytic Carbon provides another alternative to chemical treatment. Essentially, catalytic carbon is activated carbon with a modified carbon surface. Chloramines are used to control bacterial growth in distribution systems and to reduce the formation of trihalomethanes (THMs). Most Municipal water systems are now using chloramines to treat water (versus free chlorine), which dramatically reduces membrane performance (and lifetime). Chloramines should be treated as a mild oxidant and are recommended to be removed or reduced before contact with...

column7: The Tucker® 4 x 30" RO membrane makes more water than any other 4 x 30" membrane on the market today. What does this mean for you? If you replace your current (non - Tucker® branded) RO with our RO, you will instantly see more volume of water production. The Tucker® 4 x 30" RO Membrane is the best choice for any system that utilizes a 30" Membrane. Upgrade your RO system today! These 30" RO Membranes are designed to operate at extremely low operating pressures making them the perfect choice for the Tucker® RO/DI systems as well as any other system on the market. Consider changing your RO membrane when it has begun to remove less than 80% of the impurities in the water. The fewer impurities the RO can remove, the more you will spend on DI filter replacements. This is the membrane used in the Tucker® 4060 System. Water Resistant Lubricant may be required and is available HERE

column3: 12v Delivery Panel w/Controller and Long Range Remote
column7: Are you the DIY type? These delivery panels are pretty sweet. They are made from a lightweight aluminum and easily mount to many different surfaces. They include the RHG delivery pump with digital flow controller and on/off Remote control. The pump will siphon your pure water holding tank and deliver the water via a hose (not included) to your water-fed pole. The digital flow controller allows you to turn up or down the flow/pressure of your pump based on your specific job. This in turn allows you to conserve your pure water supply for the day. The remote has multiple functions built in including the ability to turn up, down, and off the flow of water. Simply hook the inlet side of the pump up to a short hose that siphons your tank and the outlet side of the pump to a hose/reel that feeds your water-fed pole. Utilizes the V16 Flow Controllers. The only other thing you need is a 12 volt battery to supply this power. Not sure how to hook it up? Give us a call and we'll walk you...

A waterproof on/off rocker switch is included to turn on/off the booster pump. The pump and switch are wired to a fuse block that can easily accept more wiring in from your delivery panel or any other 12v accessories you may be looking to incorporate into your system. Also included is a dual probe inline TDS meter with 1/2" tubing push to fit tees. This meter is set up to measure 2 sources of water for you on your pure water system. You can measure inlet water, RO water, DI water or any other source you would like. This product pairs great with our DIY 4 stage RO / DI kit and 12v Delivery Panel.

column7: Lichen Removal Agent (LRA) is a concentrated removal agent for lichens, mosses and other fungi designed specifically to be used on solar panels, specially in very humid environments and with large amount of organic matter (near forest, agricultural plantations, etc.) LRA is a biodegradable product designed to be as delicate as possible with the components of the solar module (ARC, silicone and aluminium frame). The product will help break the bond between the lichen and the solar glass, making them easier to remove. This is a remediation product and should be used as such. To avoid the recurring use of the product please act preventively and protect your modules with one of our coatings. The coating will seal the glass and any future growth of lichen will not be bonded to it so strongly thus making them easier to remove. Dilution: 1kg of product for 10 litres of water. column2: NEW Tucker Standard Size Glide Brush w/ Loct fitting, Quad Pencil Jets
column3: Water Fed Brush | Tucker® Glide - 4 Pencil Jets - NEW Standard Size w/ Loct fitting Quad
column7: Designed for experienced and new window washers alike, this American made water fed brush is made from a new synthetic material that out performs boar bristle in our testing. Whereas boar bristle brushes will shed, these brushes will last far longer. Due to the nature of the bristle material you are able to get the boar bristle aggressive scrub, but also rinse on the glass in far more scenarios. The bristles will not hold dirt like boar bristle brushes so you will find these more forgiving for new comers in training or just getting started. This brush comes with 4 plumbed pencil jets, creating direct streams of high-pressure water that powers away grime. Pencil jets have long been the standard jet when rinsing glass. Available in 2 sizes - the standard (made for more of a residential size window) and the XL (made for more commercial size windows and solar panels) Details: Made in USA Full Trim Synthetic Bristle Material Lightweight LOCT Socket 4 Pencil Jets Jets Plumbed together...

column7: New from Tucker® is the Honey Badger range of brushes. Designed and tested by solar panel cleaning companies. The Honey Badger features our incredibly popular Glide bristles on the outside trim and a much stiffer bristle on the inside trim. This allows for an aggressive scrub on the panel designed to remove bird droppings and, as many testers have reported, even bee droppings from time to time. Hence the name, Honey Badger. Those looking for an aggressive scrub on windows will also benefit from this brush.

Simple 3/4" brass garden hose fittings on inlet and outlet. Hook up your tap water supply hose to the inlet and your pure water supply line to the outlet. column7: ALL STANDARD BRUSHES NOW INCLUDE THE LOCT SYSTEM TUCKER DUAL TRIM WATER FED BRUSH - BOAR AND NYLON BRISTLE HYBRID - 2 PENCIL JETS Our dual trim, hybrid water fed brushes are the ultimate glass cleaning brush for solar panel and window cleaning businesses. This hybrid, dual trim brush has bristles that are longer on the outer edge of the brush, allowing the operator to splay the bristles into corners and sides of the glass. The shorter, inner bristles remain upright and allow the tip of the bristle fiber to continue scrubbing directly on inner surface of the glass. This brush comes with 2 individually plumbed pencil jets, which help direct a high-pressure stream of water that assists the brush operator by blasting away stubborn dirt. Brush may come in red or black depending on availability. column7: If you're looking for an excellent 12V pump for siphoning your pure water tank and pushing water to your water fed pole and brush this is the best option. Or if you would like to draw water from a tank to feed you Tucker® DI system. This is the correct replacement pump for the delivery pump on a Fill n Go unit and our 12V Delivery Panel. SPECIFICATIONS OPEN FLOW RATE: 1.4 GPM MAX PSI: 90 PSI CURRENT: 9.9 AMPS @ 90 PSI The thread on the pump is 3/8" female NPT. Inlet/outlet fittings not included Optional fittings available here: Two 3/8" barb or Two 1/2" PTF NOTE With this pump we recommend the addition of the Tucker® Digital Flow Controller . Failure to use the Tucker® Digital Flow Controller may result in premature pump failure.
